title: Hi~ o(*￣▽￣*)ブ
content:
# Hi! ✨ I'm Alice

- 🌱 Born ????-?-?? in China (It's a secret)— a recreational coder & open source enthusiast, currently a third-year CS undergraduate.
- I like to spend time on interesting things.
- I'm grateful to live in an open-source world. I love Math & Physics & Code & Philosophy
- I'm happy to contribute for free to fun projects & ideas, feel free to email me.
- If you're interested in what I'm building, welcome to join me.

> "The mission of learning is to gain an understanding of various designs."
>"Trying to do better."
> "Attempt to achieve any sustainable behavior through automated means."

**For any suggestions/ideas/questions about the website, feel free to open an issue  or email me~**
